t_ch: 我说地衡司那边也不去查查干这混账事的是谁，哎，我早就说了，这样迟早会在化外民面前丢我们仙舟的面儿！
t_en: Why isn't the Realm-Keeping Commission looking into who's behind this rotten business? *sigh* I told them this is going to bring shame to the whole Xianzhou in front of Outworlders!

t_ch: 哎，这种乌烟瘴气的东西真的是…咳咳，你别盯着我看了，我得赶紧走了，回聊！
t_en: *sigh* This kind of indecency is really... Ahem, don't stare at me. I have to get back. Chat later!

t_ch: 你曾击碎过无数像这样无辜的罐子，可这一个却明显不同。它非但没有如预期般四分五裂，甚至立在原地，纹丝不动。
t_en: You've smashed countless innocent vases like this before, but this one is markedly different. Instead of shattering to pieces as expected, it somehow stays in place, motionless.

t_ch: 你干嘛呀你！
t_en: Hey, what are you doing!

t_ch: 罐子中突然传来一声怪叫。成为「无名客」已有一段时日了，你自认见多识广，但还是吓了一大跳。
t_en: A sudden strange cry emanates from the vase. You've been a Nameless for a while now and consider yourself experienced in many things, but this is still a shock.

t_ch: 罐子会说话？
t_en: A talking vase?

t_ch: 你见过会说话的罐子？清醒一点。
t_en: Have you ever seen a talking vase before? Sober up.

t_ch: （再打一下。）
t_en: (Whack it again.)

t_ch: 诶呦喂，你轻点，我脑仁儿都快震出来了。
t_en: Hey hey hey, take it easy. My brains are about to explode.

t_ch: 在下「罐中仙」，住在这罐子中，避世隐居数千载。今日若不是遇到你这么个愣头青，我还能再消停个几千年。
t_en: I'm the Immortal in a Vase, and I've lived in this vase in seclusion for thousands of years. And if it weren't for a klutz like you today, I'd probably have chilled out another few millennia more.

t_ch: 对不起…
t_en: Sorry...

t_ch: 无妨、无妨，久居螺蛳壳中，固是怡然自得，竟也会偶感无趣。你来扰我清闲，也未必不是我想要的。
t_en: No matter. No matter. Living in a snail's shell is pleasant enough, but I still perceive boredom once in a long while. Your disturbance is not unwelcomed, it seems.

t_ch: （再打一下。）
t_en: (Whack it again.)

t_ch: 停！你还打上瘾了是吧？你这年轻人还真是，气盛如豺虎，性行暴如雷。
t_en: Stop it! Are you addicted to doing that? Kids these days — you're a vicious beast with a thunderous temper.

t_ch: 这罐子虽是俗物，但有我罐中仙的修为加持，自不是你这小东西能动摇分毫的。
t_en: This vase may be an ordinary object, but with the blessings of my power, a pipsqueak like you won't be able to shake it up at all.

t_ch: 你为什么住在罐子里？
t_en: Why do you live inside a vase?

t_ch: 你又为什么不住在罐子里？这尘世凶残险恶，唯有罐中的一方天地独享清闲。寰宇无穷亦樊笼，螺蛳壳里天地宽。
t_en: Why don't YOU live in a vase? The mortal world is cruel and evil, and only within this vase can I enjoy my peace. The universe is an infinite bird cage, and this snail's shell is as liberating as an entire world.

t_ch: 你怎么钻到这里面去的？
t_en: How did you get in there?

t_ch: 这又有什么稀奇的？心地上无风涛，肉身也能自在如意。明镜台上多浮尘，纵能有千种变化，亦不得入碧洞仙境。
t_en: What's so strange about this? If my mind is tranquil and serene, then my flesh would become truly liberated. A soul flooded with mundane concerns can never enter the world of celestials, no matter how much the individual can shapeshift.

t_ch: 说来也妙，凭我的修为，一般人是注意不到这罐子的，而你注意到了。若不是你根骨不凡，那就是冥冥之中自有定数。
t_en: In fact, with the amount of power I have, most people wouldn't notice this vase. Yet you did. If you're not an extraordinary person already, then you're destined for greatness somewhere.

t_ch: 不如帮我办件事吧，就当是扰我清闲的赔礼。
t_en: Why don't you give me a hand? Consider that as an apology for disturbing me.

t_ch: 听起来很麻烦，不去。
t_en: Sounds like a hassle. No thanks.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！自在随性！自在随性！那我的这桩事，我且说之，你且听之。帮与不帮，取决于你，我绝不强求。
t_en: Hahahha, very well! Be free! Be free! How about I tell you what's going on, and you simply listen? After that, it's up to you whether you want to help. I would not force you.

t_ch: 好啊，听起来有点意思。
t_en: Alright, sounds interesting.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！古道热肠！古道热肠！那我的这桩事，就请你帮帮忙了。并不是什么难事，也不着急，你有空时留意一下便好。
t_en: Hahaha, very well! How considerate! How considerate! Well then, please help me out. It's nothing difficult and there's no rush. Just do it when you have the time.

t_ch: 帮你有任何好处吗？
t_en: Is there any advantage to helping you out?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！不为声名绊，一心讨钱帛！放心好了，我虽避世数千载，但也还不至于付不出那一点酬劳。
t_en: Hahaha, very well! Unfettered by repute or fame, focused solely on worldly wealth! Don't worry. I may have been out of this world for a few thousand years, but I can still afford a small sum as thanks.

t_ch: 请你替我找五袋垃圾过来。这罐中一尘不染，我总觉得缺了些烟火气。找到以后，投进我这罐里就好。
t_en: Please find me five bags of trash. Within this vase lies a spotless vacuum, and I've always felt it lacks the hustle and bustle of mortal life. Once you find the trash, simply toss them into my vase.

t_ch: 那「罐」伫立在那里。罐中仙所言非虚，这就是一个俗物。你曾打碎过无数个这样的罐子。
t_en: The vase stands there, as much a mundane object as the Immortal in a Vase claims. You've broken countless vases like this before.

t_ch: 可它绝对与那些罐子不同。即使你说不上来哪里不同。它有一种压倒性的存在感，但不知怎么，四周的行人都对它视而不见。
t_en: But it's definitely different from all those other vases, even if you can't tell what that difference is. Its presence is overwhelming, but is somehow ignored by passers-by.

t_ch: （投入物品。）
t_en: (Put the items inside.)

t_ch: （把手伸进罐子里。）
t_en: (Put your hand into the vase.)

t_ch: 你把手放到罐口，却无论如何也放不进去。你没摸到任何阻碍物，但那股强大的抵抗力却是货真价实的。
t_en: You try putting your hand into the vase, but can't seem to do it. You don't feel any obstacles, but the force resisting you is definitely real.

t_ch: 此时，一个声音顺着手臂的骨骼直冲冲地蹿进你的脑内：「访仙需择礼，礼到门自开。」
t_en: Right at that moment, a voice rushes straight into your brain through the bones in your arm: "Provide a gift, and the path to visiting the celestial will open."

t_ch: （算了，以后再说。）
t_en: (Maybe later.)

t_ch: 你看了看手中的几袋垃圾，又看了看那个算不上大的罐子。这么多的垃圾，真能塞进这个罐子吗？
t_en: You gaze down at the trash in your hands, then back at this relatively small vase. Can you really stuff this much trash into this vase?

t_ch: 但这也不能细想，毕竟长乐天的行人们也很难想象你怎么能带着几袋垃圾满街跑。
t_en: But it's not something for you to ponder over. After all, pedestrians in the Exalting Sanctum also can't imagine you running all over the place with bags of trash.

t_ch: 你将一袋垃圾塞进罐子，它本应落入罐底，但你没听到任何声响。接着，你塞进了剩下几袋。它们就这样无声无息地消失了。
t_en: You stuff one bag into the vase. It should drop down to the bottom, but you don't hear any sound. Then, you shove in the remaining trash. They disappear without a sound.

t_ch: 这是…人间烟火气…没想到你还真给我带来了。
t_en: This is... The hustle and bustle of the mortal realm... I didn't expect you to actually bring it.

t_ch: 嗯…甚好，这个味儿对了！我为你准备了谢礼。仙门已开，你径自来取吧。
t_en: Mmm... very well. That's exactly what I wanted! Here's a gift for you. The gates to the celestial realm are open. Come and get it.

t_ch: （伸手进去。）
t_en: (Put your hand in.)

t_ch: 你不会咬我吧…
t_en: You won't bite me, right...?

t_ch: 罐中仙报以沉默。这种沉默可能是一种独属于它的幽默恶作剧，也可能只是一个单纯的掠食陷阱。
t_en: The Immortal in a Vase remains silent. The silence might be a prank, or it could simply be a predatory trap.

t_ch: 谨慎起见，你将左手伸了进去，因为你还要留一只惯用手来使用武器、牙刷和餐具。
t_en: You dip your left hand in as a precaution, keeping your dominant hand free to use a weapon, a toothbrush, or a fork in the future.

t_ch: 你直接摸到了罐底。那里没有你刚投入的垃圾，也没有像是「罐中仙」的东西。接着，你在罐底摸到了一个东西——那是罐中仙的「谢礼」。
t_en: You touch the bottom of the vase. The rubbish you dropped in is nowhere to be found, and there's nothing that might be the Immortal in a Vase. Then, you do feel something — it's the Immortal's "gift."

t_ch: 你抽回手。罐子伫立在眼前，沉默地存在着。
t_en: You pull out your hand. The vase stands before you in silence.

t_ch: 终年潜居仙境里，千古怅然弹指间。年轻人，你又来了。上次你为我这罐中天地带来了人间烟火，多亏了你，现在罐中已是万物竟发。
t_en: An eternity in the celestial realm, a millennium gone in a flash. {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, you've come back. You brought me some of the hustle and bustle of humanity last time. Thanks to you, my vase has everything now.

t_ch: 你真该来看看现在的罐中世界，我称之为「自在樊笼」。怎么样，要进来看看吗？
t_en: You really should come in and see the world inside this vase. I call it my Cage of Freedom. Go on. Are you coming in for a look or not?

t_ch: 进不去！怎么想都进不去吧！
t_en: What? There's no way the Trailblazer can fit in there!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，是吗？那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千化变千妙脱骨。
t_en: Hahaha, really? That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.

t_ch: （把手伸进去。）
t_en: (Reach in with your hand.)

t_ch: 你曾轻易地将手臂伸进罐中，取出了罐中仙的谢礼。可这一次，你的手却卡在了罐口。这是理所当然的事情——人的手怎么可能塞进那么窄的罐口呢？
t_en: Last time, you easily reached into the vase and took out the Immortal's gift. But this time, your hand gets caught on the mouth of the vase. That's normal — how could a human hand hope to fit into such a small vase?

t_ch: 进不去吗…哈哈，那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千化变千妙脱骨。
t_en: Can't fit? Haha... That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.

t_ch: （把头探进去。）
t_en: (Stick your head in.)

t_ch: 罐中仙神通广大，将你纳入其中，恐怕也并非难事。可出乎意料的是，你的头卡在了罐口。这是理所当然的事情——人的头怎么可能塞进那么窄的罐口呢？
t_en: The Immortal has miraculous powers, and it may be able to include you in the vase. But somehow, your head gets caught on the mouth of the vase. That's normal — how could a human head hope to fit into such a small vase?

t_ch: 进不去吗…哈哈，那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千万变千化脱骨。
t_en: Can't fit? Haha... That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.

t_ch: 既然如此…我正好有一事相求。有些东西在你身上是蜕去俗骨的阻碍，却恰好能为我所用。
t_en: In this case... I actually have a request. There're some things on you that's preventing you from shrugging off your mortal shell, but are in fact quite useful to me.

t_ch: 正因为那种东西，你才不得不奔忙于世间。你本可以将满足自身的渴望放在首位，却不得不为你的伙伴浪费短暂的生命。
t_en: It's because of those things that you have to busy yourself in the mortal realm. You could've put your own satisfaction first, instead of wasting this short life of yours on your companions.

t_ch: 可我的罐中世界正需要它。那些「人间烟火」肆意生长，弥漫在罐中的每个角落，却认识不到谁才是这「自在樊笼」真正的主人。
t_en: But it's just what I need in this world inside my vase. That "hustle and bustle of humankind" is growing rampantly, filling every spot in this vase — but it doesn't recognize who is the real owner of this Cage of Freedom.

t_ch: 我要你将这东西交给我。帮助我，也是帮助你自己。
t_en: I want you to hand those things over to me. Help me, and perhaps you'll be helping yourself.

t_ch: 没听懂，这是什么东西？
t_en: I don't understand. What do you mean?

t_ch: 别跟我谜语人…
t_en: You sound like the Riddlers...

t_ch: 能使毛物脱兽皮，能教水虫岸上栖，与化去而不见兮，此奇怪物不可欺。
t_en: It can shed the skin of beasts, teach aquatic bugs to live on land, and disappear without being seen. This strange thing cannot be provoked.

t_ch: 不懂也无妨。你站在那里不要动，我径自来取。
t_en: It doesn't matter if you don't understand. Just stand there, and don't move. I'll get it myself.

t_ch: （站住不动。）
t_en: (Stand still.)

t_ch: 你站住不动，紧盯着罐子。罐口在你的眼中越来越大，仿佛可以吞没你。又或许，它的确吞没了你。
t_en: You stand still and stare at the vase as it expands before your very eyes, as if trying to engulf you. Or perhaps, it does indeed engulf you.

t_ch: 甚好。这正我所需要的东西。请你稍等一下。你帮了我很多忙，我想再给你一点谢礼。
t_en: Very well. This is exactly what I need. Hold on a second. You've really helped me out, and I want to make sure I thank you properly.

t_ch: 别过来，我不给。
t_en: Don't come over here. You can't have it.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，别那么害怕。你不肯给，我自然也不会强取。
t_en: Hahaha, don't be scared. I won't take anything you don't want to give.

t_ch: 你再好好考虑一下吧。与你不同，我有很多时间。
t_en: Have another think about it. Unlike you, I have all the time in the world to spare.

t_ch: 罐中仙陷入了沉默。
t_en: The Immortal falls silent.

t_ch: 如何？你改变主意了吗？要将那东西给我吗？
t_en: How about it, then? Have you changed your mind? Do you want to give it to me?

t_ch: 你自己来拿吧。
t_en: Come and get it.

t_ch: 那就请你站好，不要动。
t_en: Okay, please stand still, and don't move.

t_ch: 你站住不动，紧盯着罐子。罐口在你的眼中越来越大，仿佛可以吞没你。又或许，它的确吞没了你。
t_en: You stand still and stare at the vase as it expands before your very eyes, as if trying to engulf you. Or perhaps, it does indeed engulf you.

t_ch: 甚好。这正我所需要的东西。请你稍等一下。你帮了我很多忙，我想再给你一点谢礼。
t_en: Very well. This is exactly what I need. Hold on a second. You've really helped me out, and I want to make sure I thank you properly.

t_ch: 不，绝不。
t_en: Absolutely not.

t_ch: 好风骨！可惜铁骨硬，终究解骨难啊…罢了，罢了。
t_en: Such character! Unfortunately, those tough bones of yours could well run into trouble... Never mind. Never mind.

t_ch: 请你稍等一下。我麻烦了你不少事，应当给你准备些赔礼才是。
t_en: Please wait a moment. I've put you through a lot of trouble, so I should give you something to make up for it.

t_ch: 我再考虑一下…
t_en: Let me reconsider...

t_ch: 罐中仙陷入了沉默。
t_en: The Immortal falls silent.

t_ch: 罐中仙陷入了沉默。
t_en: The Immortal falls silent.

t_ch: 谢礼准备好了。仙门已开，你径自来取吧。
t_en: The thank-you gift is ready. The gate to the celestial realm is open. Come and get it yourself.

t_ch: （把手伸进去。）
t_en: (Reach in with your hand.)

t_ch: 你真的不会咬我吧…
t_en: Promise you're really not gonna bite me...?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，我无爪牙之利，又怎么能咬你呢？
t_en: Hahaha. Even if I want to, I don't have teeth!

t_ch: 你的手毫无阻碍地伸入了罐中。你在罐底摸索着，想要找到罐中仙的「谢礼」。
t_en: Your hand reaches into the vase without any obstruction. You grope around the bottom, trying to find this "thank-you gift."

t_ch: 很快，你找到了。
t_en: Soon, you find it.

t_ch: 那件「谢礼」有着柔软光滑的表面。它散发着温热的气息，在你的指尖有节奏地起伏着。感知到你的存在，它缓缓翻了个身，抱住了你的手指。
t_en: This "thank-you gift" has a soft, sleek surface. It radiates warmth, which rises and falls rhythmically against your fingertips. Sensing your existence, it slowly turns over and hugs your fingers.

t_ch: 无数个坚硬的锐物温柔地攀上了你的手指。这并不疼，因为它尽可能不伤害到你。它越抱越紧，很快，你的指关节感受到了微凉的吐息。
t_en: Countless hard and sharp objects gently crawl up your fingers. It doesn't hurt because it's being very careful not to hurt you. It grips tighter and tighter, until your knuckles soon feel a slight, cool breath.

t_ch: 你迅速抽出了手。
t_en: You pull your hand straight out.

t_ch: 这是什么鬼东西！
t_en: What the heck was that!?

t_ch: 这谢礼太贵重了，我不能要…
t_en: This thank-you gift is too precious for me to hold on to...

t_ch: （警惕地盯着罐中仙。）
t_en: (Stare in suspicion at the Immortal in a Vase.)

t_ch: 嗯？你不喜欢它吗？它可是你亲自给我带来的。
t_en: Huh? Don't you like it? But you gave this to me yourself.

t_ch: 我带来的绝不是这东西！
t_en: This is not what I brought!

t_ch: 我带来的只是垃圾…
t_en: All I brought you was some trash...

t_ch: 嗯？哦…我忘了，你对「生命」缺乏了解。是我不好。洪钧陶万类，大块禀群生，如是而已。
t_en: Eh? Oh... I forgot your lack of understanding about "life." My bad. Nature sculpts us all on its potter's wheel, and the land creates the masses. That's all.

t_ch: 如果你不喜欢，我也准备了其他的谢礼。你可径自来取。
t_en: If you don't like it, I have some other thank-you gifts. Come and pick one yourself.

t_ch: （把手伸进去。）
t_en: (Reach in with your hand.)

t_ch: 你将手探进罐底，很快就找到了另一份「谢礼」。它不会动，这很好。
t_en: Reaching your hand to the bottom of the vase, you soon find another "thank-you gift." It doesn't move, which is a good start.

t_ch: 我不会再把手伸进去了。
t_en: I'm not sticking my hand in there again.

t_ch: 是吗？真遗憾。
t_en: Really? That's a pity.

t_ch: 罐中仙不再说话。
t_en: The Immortal in a Vase stops talking.

t_ch: 你看着眼前的罐子，做工粗陋、平平无奇。刚才的一切都仿佛一场幻觉。也许这的确是一场幻觉。
t_en: You look at the crude and ordinary vase before you. Everything that happened just now feels like a fevered dream. And perhaps it was?

t_ch: 你曾击碎过无数像这样无辜的罐子，这一个也并无不同。
t_en: You've smashed countless ordinary vases like this before, and this one's no different.

t_ch: 罐子应声而碎，仿佛什么都没有发生过。不…就是什么都没有发生过。
t_en: The vase shatters as if nothing had ever happened. No... nothing did happen.

t_ch: 此处没有发生过任何事，此处最好没有发生过任何事，此处不该发生过任何事。
t_en: Nothing happened here. Nothing had better happened here. Nothing should have happened here.

t_ch: 此处没有发生过任何事。就这样吧，这样最好。
t_en: Nothing happened here. That's it. It's best like this.

t_ch: 这是一间破旧的杂货铺。它只兀自静静矗立着，以冷眼目送往来人群，在这向来熙来攘往的宣夜大街上显得尤为低调。
t_en: This is a broken-down old newsstand. It just stands there in silence, watching the crowd impassively. It seems particularly low-key among the humdrum of Starwatcher Avenue.

t_ch: 这门面似是停了有些时日，台面上的积灰如此表示。但你并不清楚它缘何阖门，也不知道在那之后过去了多少个仙舟的自然日。
t_en: This shop front seems like it had been closed for some time, judging from the thick build-up of dust. But you don't know why it's closed down, nor how many Xianzhou days have passed since its shutdown.

t_ch: 它看起来不属于任何人，或许也正确实如此。
t_en: It looks like it doesn't belong to anyone. Perhaps it really doesn't.

t_ch: 你明白吗？刚才那句话实际上是一种暗示——意在提醒你可以随意掀起门帘，而不必承担任何道德或是法律上的责任。因为它只是一幢被遗弃的孤独商铺。
t_en: Do you get it? That last sentence was actually a hint — It means you could roll up the curtain over the door at any point without any moral or legal consequences, since it's just a lonely abandoned shop.

t_ch: 所以，你会掀起门帘看看吗？你很有可能在里面找到宝贝哦。很有可能。
t_en: So, will you roll up the curtain and take a peek? You're very likely to find some treasure inside. Very likely.

t_ch: 那就让我一探究竟吧！
t_en: Then, let me find out!

t_ch: 于是你掀开了门帘，瞧见扬尘正在晦暗的屋檐下游动自如——哦，还有一个脏兮兮的小盒子，周围还附了笔墨纸砚。
t_en: You roll up the curtain and see dust floating about in the gloom — oh, there's also a filthy little box with some pens, ink, paper, and an inkstone around it.

t_ch: 「无忧堂」。如果有人会把自己的名字写进便签贴在脑门上，那这三个字就应该是了。
t_en: "House of Nepenthe." If someone wrote their name on a post-it and stuck it on their forehead, this would be the name.

t_ch: 盒子里面是什么？
t_en: What's in the box?

t_ch: 如此流畅的思路！看来你已经熟稔「开拓之道」了。那么就打开它一探究竟吧！
t_en: Such a smooth train of thought! Looks like you're already familiar with the Way of Trailblaze. Pop it open once and for all!

t_ch: 应该没有人会这么做吧…
t_en: Nobody would think to do that...

t_ch: 嘿，这不是重点！你看到了一个神秘的盒子，接下来就*应该*看看里边装了什么，不是吗？
t_en: Hey, that's not the point! You see a mysterious box, so you *should* have a look at what's inside. Right?

t_ch: 你很快打开盒子，并在里面发现了一封信，后者崭新得不像是一幢旧商铺该保存的东西。老实说，这气氛可真是有些诡异。
t_en: You quickly open the box to find a letter inside, which is in surprisingly pristine condition given the state of the old newsstand. To be honest, the whole vibe is starting to feel a little weird.

t_ch: 看来，这是一封匿名咨询信。从信中言语看来，这小店曾属于一名为「逍遥先生」的神秘人，大概是以写信提供建议、为人排忧解难营生。
t_en: Looks like this is an anonymous advisory letter. Judging from the contents, this small shop once belonged to a mysterious person named Mr. Carefree, who probably made a living by composing advice for other people.

t_ch: 而来信者似乎是第二次向这位「逍遥先生」写信请教了。可这位先生如今身在何处呢？没人知道。这位可怜的来信者的命运也不得而知。
t_en: And it seems like this is the second time the author of the letter had written to Mr. Carefree. But where could this gentleman be now? Nobody knows. The fate of the poor author of the letter also remains unknown.

t_ch: 不过，一切皆有可能——尤其是仙舟人寿命跨度如此之长，这位来信者或许还在苦苦等待那「逍遥先生」的建议呢！
t_en: But everything is possible, especially given the longevity of the Xianzhou natives. The author of this letter may still be holding out for some advice from Mr. Carefree!

t_ch: 于是，或许是因为心血来潮，你拿起盒旁的纸笔，决心代那位不知所踪的「逍遥先生」，为可怜的来信者奉上回信——
t_en: So, perhaps carried away on a whim, you pick up the pen and paper beside the box and decide to compose a reply to the poor correspondent on behalf of this missing Mr. Carefree —

t_ch: 所以，你会如何答复呢？开动脑筋，来写下开头的第一句话吧！
t_en: So then, how should you reply? Put your brain to use and write an opening line!

t_ch: 我想再看看信的内容。
t_en: I want to take another look at the letter.

t_ch: 当然没问题！这是为那来信者好，对吧？
t_en: No problem! After all, it's for the author's benefit, right?

t_ch: 尊敬的陌生人…
t_en: Dear stranger...

t_ch: 「尊敬的陌生人：」
t_en: "Dear stranger,"

t_ch: 「顷接惠书，未即奉答，歉意良深。方知尔身陷困厄，实在深感……」
t_en: "I received your letter but failed to promptly reply. Please accept my apologies. I know that you're in a difficult situation, and I really feel a deep sense of..."

t_ch: 可悲的陌生人…
t_en: Pitiable stranger...

t_ch: 「可悲的陌生人：」
t_en: "O pitiable stranger,"

t_ch: 「读过你的经历，我实在深感……」
t_en: "Reading about your experiences has left me with a deep sense of..."

t_ch: 我想再看看信的内容。
t_en: I want to take another look at the letter.

t_ch: 当然没问题！你想看几遍都可以。
t_en: No problem! Read it as many times as you need.

t_ch: 惋惜…
t_en: Regret...

t_ch: 「惋惜。故在信中妄陈鄙人……」
t_en: "...regret. Therefore, I venture to offer..."

t_ch: 困惑…
t_en: Confusion...

t_ch: 「困惑。我将在信中列举本人……」
t_en: "...confusion. In this letter, I'll list..."

t_ch: 我想再看看信的内容。
t_en: I want to take another look at the letter.

t_ch: 当然…没问题！一切为了回信。
t_en: No problem! Anything for this reply.

t_ch: 拙见…
t_en: Humble opinion...

t_ch: 「一孔之见，愿效绵薄之力。尔不妨……」
t_en: "...my humble opinion for your assistance. You may consider ..."

t_ch: 高见…
t_en: Esteemed opinion...

t_ch: 「高见如下，请你洗耳恭听。你应当……」
t_en: "...my esteemed opinion for you to carefully obey. You should..."

t_ch: 我想再看看信的内容。
t_en: I want to take another look at the letter.

t_ch: 呃…有没有一种可能——再看就该背下来了？
t_en: Er... Do you think if I read it one more time, I can actually memorize the whole thing?

t_ch: 欠债还钱，天经地义…
t_en: Repaying debts is only natural...

t_ch: 「向家人坦白之，举家还债，共谋出路。潜逃避债虽能得一夜安寝，然终究人心惶惶，朝不保夕，更将落得身陷囹圄，此无异于饮鸩止渴！」
t_en: "Be honest with your family, pay off your debt together with them, and find a way out of this together. You may get temporary respite if you run, but you'll always be looking over your shoulder, and you could land in prison. This is akin to drinking poison to slake your thirst!"

t_ch: 大难临头，远走高飞…
t_en: Flee far away, as trouble is surely imminent...

t_ch: 「与仙舟一刀两断，远走高飞！虱多不痒，债多不愁，随它去便是！」
t_en: "Cut off all ties to Xianzhou, and run for the hills! Trouble never comes alone, so don't worry about those debts — just let them all go!"

t_ch: 你提笔落款，一气呵成，将自己这篇不大美观的书法作品放回盒内。
t_en: You sign your name in one flowing motion, and shove your crude calligraphy back into the box.

t_ch: 目前，你尚不知道这一切是否真的有任何意义——何不过后再来看看呢？
t_en: Right now, you have no idea whether or not this means anything — Why not come back to check it out later?

t_ch: 不了，我向来遵纪守法。
t_en: No, I've always obeyed the law.

t_ch: 哦…那可真是遗憾。
t_en: Ah... that's a real shame.

t_ch: 但你随时可以回到这里！*随时*都可以。
t_en: But you can come back here any time! *Any* time you want.

t_ch: 这间破旧的杂货铺依旧冷冷地立在此处。自你上一次在这里以「逍遥先生」的名义，为寻求解惑的来信者送出答复已过去了一段时间。
t_en: The musty old newsstand is still standing there, impassive as ever. It's been a while since you've played the role of Mr. Carefree here, replying to correspondents writing letters in search of help.

t_ch: 为了求证你所做的一切是否有意义，你再次掀起了那落满灰尘的门帘……
t_en: You roll up that dusty curtain once more, seeking confirmation that everything you've done actually has meaning...

t_ch: …是的，先前的来信与你写成的去信双双消失在那脏兮兮的小盒中。取而代之的则是一崭新的信件——
t_en: ...It worked. The previous letter and your reply have both disappeared from that filthy little box. Instead, a brand-new letter has taken their places —

t_ch: 信中人似乎对于在千百年后再度收到「逍遥先生」来信感到十分欣喜。可你明白，时过境迁，如今的来信者与「逍遥先生」皆非故人，可谓是物是人非。
t_en: This correspondent seems delighted to have received another letter from Mr. Carefree after millennia, but you know that times have changed and this correspondent is no longer the same person who had composed the initial letter. People change.

t_ch: 你也明白，自己不可能留在这里，一辈子扮演那位替人消愁破闷的「逍遥先生」——尽管你或许真的很想这么做。
t_en: You also know that it's impossible for you to stay here, role-playing as Mr. Carefree and solving problems for everyone for the rest of your life — no matter how much you want to.

t_ch: 可你只不过是一名开拓客，是仙舟罗浮上无数来去匆匆的过客之一。你有自己必须走的路，而那位来信者亦如是。身为开拓客的你对此再清楚不过。
t_en: You're only a Trailblazer, one of the innumerable passers-by on the Xianzhou Luofu. You have your own path to take, and so does this correspondent. As a Trailblazer, this is something you know only too well.

t_ch: 「无忧堂」的信件往来即将到此为止——你伛身退出昏暗的铺面，放下门帘，径自离去。
t_en: This is the end of your correspondence in the House of Nepenthe — You duck out of the dingy storefront, let down the curtain over the door, and leave.

t_ch: 这间破旧的杂货铺依旧冷冷地立在此处。自你上一次在这里以「逍遥先生」的名义，为寻求解惑的来信者送出答复已过去了一段时间。
t_en: The musty old newsstand is still standing there, impassive as ever. It's been a while since you've played the role of Mr. Carefree here, replying to correspondents writing letters in search of help.

t_ch: 为了求证你所做的一切是否有意义，你再次掀起了那落满灰尘的门帘……
t_en: You roll up that dusty curtain once more, seeking confirmation that everything you've done actually has meaning...

t_ch: …是的，先前的来信与你写成的去信双双消失在那脏兮兮的小盒中。取而代之的则是一崭新的信件——
t_en: ...It worked. The previous letter and your reply have both disappeared from that filthy little box. Instead, a brand-new letter has taken their places —

t_ch: 信中人似乎对于在千百年后再度收到「逍遥先生」来信感到有些忧伤，信中所述的悲剧也令你感到五味杂陈。你想再回复些什么，却无论如何都不是滋味。
t_en: This correspondent seems a little sad to have received another letter from Mr. Carefree after millennia, and the tragedy outlined in the letter leaves you with mixed feelings. You want to reply, but can't find the right words.

t_ch: 你明白，时过境迁，如今的来信者与「逍遥先生」皆非故人，可谓是物是人非。你不必为这三千年前上演的小小悲剧承担任何责任。
t_en: You know that time changes everything, and this correspondent is no longer the same person who initially wrote to Mr. Carefree. People change. You don't have to bear any responsibility for this little tragedy that played out three thousand years ago.

t_ch: 你也明白，自己不可能留在这里，一辈子扮演那位替人消愁破闷的「逍遥先生」——尽管你或许真的很想这么做。
t_en: You also know that it's impossible for you to stay here, role-playing as Mr. Carefree and solving problems for everyone for the rest of your life — no matter how much you want to.

t_ch: 可你只不过是一名开拓客，是仙舟罗浮上无数来去匆匆的过客之一。你有自己必须走的路，而那位来信者亦如是。身为开拓客的你对此再清楚不过。
t_en: You're only a Trailblazer, one of the innumerable passers-by on the Xianzhou Luofu. You have your own path to take, and so does this correspondent. As a Trailblazer, this is something you know only too well.

t_ch: 「无忧堂」的信件往来即将到此为止——你伛身退出昏暗的铺面，放下门帘，径自离去。
t_en: This is the end of your correspondence in the House of Nepenthe — You duck out of the dingy storefront, let down the curtain over the door, and leave.

t_ch: 老板，看这狸！
t_en: Boss, check this out!

t_ch: 哎老板——事先说好，和之前那些同事不一样，咱这可不是上班摸鱼。
t_en: Hey, Boss, just so we're clear, I'm not like those who slack off on the clock.

t_ch: <s>俗话讲，在游戏更新的第二个版本，角色们的行为都会与之前的印象构成二律背反</s>…呃，我究竟在说什么？
t_en: <s>There's an old saying: Game characters' behavior will develop an antinomy with their previous impressions in the second major update</s>... Wait, what am I even talking about?

t_ch: 总之，变成拍摄剧集的道具，就是咱为了在这里获取最新情报的，最新的卧底手段！
t_en: Anyway, turning into a prop for the film shoot is our latest undercover tactic to snag the freshest intel around here!

t_ch: 这合理吗？
t_en: You kinda lost your reason there.

t_ch: 嗯？这儿也没河狸啊？
t_en: Huh? I don't see any raisin here.

t_ch: 上班别太拼。
t_en: Don't push yourself too hard at work.

t_ch: 没事儿没事儿，咱这个伪装，运动量为零！
t_en: No worries! This undercover work requires little physical effort!

t_ch: 说穿了，你只是想玩变身。
t_en: Let's be real. You just wanna play dress-up, don't you?

t_ch: 哎！还是老板您独具慧眼…变成超能力勇者或者外星战士，那些都还是太俗套了。时下真正的流行，乃是「新闻兵法·不动如山」！
t_en: Ah! Sharp eye, boss... Turning into a superhero or an alien warrior, that's all way too cliché these days. What's really trending now is the "Art of Journalism: Immovable as a Mountain"!

t_ch: 咳咳，开个玩笑。总之咱是在正式渠道通过应聘道具演员进来的，也不会在别人的工作场合直接拍照，没有钻任何程序上的漏洞。
t_en: Haha, just kidding! Anyway, I got in through official channels by applying as a prop actor. I'm not gonna whip out my camera on someone else's work site. Besides, I didn't exploit any loopholes or anything.

t_ch: 不过嘛，只要消息进了咱的耳朵，那世上就自然没有不透风的墙——这可是八卦记者的职业素养，老板也一定明白我在说什么吧？不占用您的时间了，老板再见！
t_en: But hey, once word reaches my ears, there's no such thing as a secret that stays hidden. That's the mark of a professional gossip journalist, and I'm sure you know exactly what I mean, boss! Won't take up any more of your time. Catch you later, boss!

t_ch: 哟，老板！好久不见，不知在您的眼中，在下的模仿能力有没有新的长进？
t_en: Yo, boss! Been a while! So, what do you think? Any improvements for my imitation?

t_ch: 不是，我怎么成了展品？
t_en: Wait, how did I become an exhibit!?

t_ch: 因为台上的{NICKNAME}其实是我倒影狸啊！
t_en: Because the {NICKNAME} on stage is me, Fureflecto!

t_ch: 爱模仿我的，是哪个狸来着？
t_en: Which furbo was it that liked to imitate me again?

t_ch: 是我倒影狸啊！
t_en: It's me, Fureflecto!

t_ch: 诶，老板你有所不知——这里原本摆着《苍天航路绒绒号》里的球棒浣熊限定款模型。在下寻思，这二次创作跟原型的距离有点太远，实在是不够激动人心……
t_en: Ah, boss, you probably don't know the full story. There used to be a limited edition Baseball Raccoon figure from Fluffy Across the Blue sitting right here. But I figured that this fan creation strayed a bit too far from the original design, and honestly, it just wasn't exciting enough...

t_ch: 所以，就有了在下基于自己理解的这次再创作！请叫它行为艺术！
t_en: That's why I created this re-creation based on my own understanding! Please call it an art!

t_ch: 不断有观众来找我打卡互动哩，有摸我脑门的，舒服得我哩哩叫！
t_en: Tons of visitors keep coming up to interact with me! Some pat my forehead. It feels so good that I start furboing with delight!

t_ch: 还有尝试喂我干脆面的，我说我不爱吃这个，爱吃叶子，还把他们吓了一跳！
t_en: And some tried to feed me instant noodles! I told them I don't like those and I prefer leaves. It totally freaked them out!

t_ch: 你还是快下来吧！
t_en: Why don't you come down!

t_ch: 你这是对我的严重ooc！
t_en: You're acting completely out of my character!

t_ch: 老板，秉承新的创作理念…
t_en: Boss, it's time to embrace a new creative philosophy...

t_ch: 您的模仿者再次前来较量！
t_en: Your imitator has come to challenge you once more!

t_ch: 老板老板，在下有没有展示出二次创作的灵魂？
t_en: Boss, did I show you the true soul of fan creation?

t_ch: 那可创作得太糟糕了。
t_en: That's a terrible piece of work.

t_ch: 什么？竟然……
t_en: What!? No way...

t_ch: 唉，看来连老板也无法理解在下的艺术…在下的确是误入歧途了啊。
t_en: *sigh* It seems even the boss can't appreciate my art... I've truly lost my way.

t_ch: ——老板千万不要怪罪！进行新的修炼之后，在下还会来找您检验的！
t_en: Please don't be upset with me, boss! I'll come back for another test once I'm done with my new training!

t_ch: 别说，是有点抽象的灵魂。
t_en: Well, that's one abstract soul right there.

t_ch: 哇！老板你是懂行的！艺术的灵魂就是抽象！
t_en: Whoa! Boss, you really get it! The soul of art is abstraction!

t_ch: 在下这真是跃跃欲试，迫不及待要投入新的修炼了…老板，下次再会！
t_en: I'm itching to get started and can't wait to dive into my new training... See you next time, boss!

t_ch: 我就没有肖像权吗？
t_en: Don't I have any portrait rights?

t_ch: 唔…原来，老板始终在意的是这一点吗？
t_en: Hmm... So that's what you have been worried about all along, boss?

t_ch: …明白了，在下会改头换面，投入新的的修炼！老板，后会有期！
t_en: ...Understood. I'll reinvent myself and throw myself into a new training! Boss, until we meet again!

t_ch: 老板，鉴定一下我埋伏的实力！
t_en: Boss, check out my ambush skills!

t_ch: 怎么样，老板！我这一招「藏木于林」效果如何？
t_en: So, boss! How'd you like my little "hiding in plain sight" trick?

t_ch: 你管这叫藏木于林？
t_en: You call this hiding in plain sight?

t_ch: 上次我不是变成中庭的树木吗？那个还是有些显眼了，所以这次我决定加入「绒绒号」的主角团！
t_en: Didn't I turn into a tree in the courtyard last time? That was a bit too conspicuous, so this time I've decided to join the main cast of "The Fluffy"!

t_ch: 行吧，没让我少找…
t_en: Alright, that took me forever to find...

t_ch: 嘿嘿，上次我不是变成中庭的树木吗？那个还是有些显眼了，所以这次我决定加入「绒绒号」的主角团！
t_en: Hehe, didn't I turn into a tree in the courtyard last time? That was a bit too conspicuous, so this time I've decided to join the main cast of "The Fluffy"!

t_ch: 不如上次变银杏树。
t_en: Not as good as last time when you turned into a ginkgo tree.

t_ch: 什么？我本想变成中庭的树木还是有些显眼了，所以这次我才决定加入「绒绒号」的主角团！
t_en: What? I intended to turn into a tree in the courtyard, yet it would be a bit too conspicuous, so this time I've decided to join the main cast of "The Fluffy"!

t_ch: …嗯，对！其实是老板玩捉迷藏的能力突飞猛进了！这才显得我精心谋划的进阶技巧反而平平无奇！
t_en: ...Uh-huh, yeah! Actually, it's the boss's hide-and-seek skills that have improved dramatically! That's why my carefully planned advancement techniques seem so unexceptional in comparison!

t_ch: 啊…要是我也能像老板一样，亲身参与「绒绒号」那样的奇遇就好了……
t_en: Ahh... If only I could experience a wondrous adventure like you did in "The Fluffy"...

t_ch: 努力就能改变命运。
t_en: Hard work can change your destiny.

t_ch: 谢谢老板鼓励！我这就去关注一百个健身博主！
t_en: Thanks for the encouragement, boss! I'm gonna go follow a hundred fitness bloggers right now!

t_ch: 不是谁胸口都埋着星核。
t_en: Not everyone has a Stellaron lodged in their chest.

t_ch: 哦…原来如此！
t_en: Ohh... I see!

t_ch: 明白了，我这就去关注一百个幻造生物学博主，看看能不能给自己也植入星核！
t_en: Got it! I'll go follow a hundred imagenesis bloggers right now and see if I can get a Stellaron implanted in myself too!

t_ch: 好，就派你去除掉纳努克！
t_en: Alright, then I'll send you to get rid of Nanook!

t_ch: …啊？我吗？
t_en: ...Huh? Me?

t_ch: 呃，仔细想想，我也算是上有老下有小……
t_en: Oh, wait, I've got family and kids...

t_ch: 老板再见！
t_en: See ya, boss!

t_ch: 是我呀，这样悄无声息地出现，吓到你了吗？
t_en: It's me. Did I scare you with how I popped up without a sound?

t_ch: 很惊喜，也很意外。
t_en: I'm pleasantly surprised, actually.

t_ch: 嗯哼~你的回答总是令人欣悦，真是像蜜饯一样甜美的孩子……
t_en: Mm-hmm~ Your answer is always so delightful, and you're as sweet as sugary preserves, dear child...

t_ch: 你是…大丽花的COSER?
t_en: You're... cosplaying as The Dahlia?

t_ch: 是吗？那你说一说，我的香气、裙角和笑容，与你记忆中的她有几分还原？
t_en: Oh really? Then tell me: my perfume, the hem of my dress, my smile... how closely do they match the woman in your memories?

t_ch: 你看，匹诺康尼本身已经是一场梦境了，这里的人们却为你经历的梦境又搭建了一场异常浮华的造梦。
t_en: You see, Penacony itself is already a dreamscape, yet the people here have built an extravagantly ornate dream based on the dream you experienced.

t_ch: 偶尔我也羡慕过，那么多人为你的故事欢呼，你总是与开拓银轨上遥遥升起的黎明相伴，而不是那些终将腐烂成灰的记忆。
t_en: Sometimes I envy you. So many people are cheering for your story. You're always there with the dawn rising over the silver rails of the Trailblaze, not stuck with memories that'll just rot away to nothing.

t_ch: 不过，被遗忘的东西也是有温度的，像一场散场舞会之后，曾经紧贴的额头上久久不散的余温…哦！你脸红了，是狸我太近了吗？
t_en: But even forgotten things carry warmth, like the lingering heat on foreheads pressed close together long after the dance has ended... Oh! You're blushing. Am I fur too close to you?

t_ch: 至少此刻，别狸开我的视线，别擅自挣脱属于你我的这份「记忆」喔……
t_en: At least at this moment, don't furb away from me, and don't break free from this memory that belongs to you and me...

t_ch: 很遗憾，我已经识破了。
t_en: Sorry to break it to you, but I've already seen through you.

t_ch: 狸言狸语出卖了你！
t_en: Your furbo speaking habits just gave you away!

t_ch: 什、什么？我被识破了？
t_en: Wh—What!? You saw right through me?

t_ch: 亏我熟读了一百遍《苍天航路绒绒号·橡木鸣蛀之梦篇》，还背诵了这么多句子作为我的开场白。
t_en: I've read Fluffy Across the Blue: Dream of Gnawing Oak a hundred times and memorized all those lines for my opening!

t_ch: 哼！既然如此，那就——为我，焚身起舞吧！
t_en: Hmph! In that case... Immolate yourself in my dance!

t_ch: 你怎么还在背她的台词？
t_en: Why are you still reciting her lines?

t_ch: 将我，铭心蚀骨吧！
t_en: Etch me into your bones!

t_ch: 哎呦，下手轻点！
t_en: Ow, be gentle!

t_ch: 曲终人亡的时刻…美不胜收。啊啊啊，可惜现在要亡的是我「大狸花」哩！
t_en: The moment when it all dies... is so beautiful. Ahhh, the one about to die now is me, The Dahlifur!

t_ch: …老板，我知道错了。可我真的太喜欢玩cosplay了，从来没有那么多人关注过我、喜欢过我，只有变成他们喜欢的角色的模样……
t_en: ...Boss, I know I was wrong. I just love cosplaying so much. No one's ever paid attention to me like this... No one's ever liked me this much. It's only when I become the characters they love...

t_ch: 大家才会注意到我，亲热地喊我「老师」，把我簇拥在人群中心啊！
t_en: That's when everyone would notice me, call me with such warmth, and have me right at the center of the crowd!

t_ch: 你给我回去好好上班！
t_en: Get back to work!

t_ch: 啊啊啊，难怪老板不让我玩cosplay，因为…现在还是上班时间啊！
t_en: Ahhh, no wonder the boss won't let me do cosplay, because... I'm still on the clock!

t_ch: 我这就回去认真工作，等下班时间，我可以再来的吧？我会再来的！
t_en: I'll head back and get to work right away, but I can come back after work, right? I'll definitely be back!

t_ch: 你就在星铁FES当演员吧！
t_en: You should totally be an actor at Star Rail FEST!

t_ch: 啊啊啊，老板您…也为我一比一还原的cosplay而倾倒吗？就知道我的狸猫变化之术堪称天衣无缝，除了老板根本无人能识破哩！
t_en: Ahhh, Boss! Are you... blown away by my perfect cosplay, all too faithful to the original? I knew my furbo transformation technique was absolutely flawless. No one but you could ever see through it!

t_ch: 祝老板参观愉快！那我就多走动走动，去打卡下一个展览点位了。
t_en: Hope you enjoy your visit, boss! I'm gonna keep moving and check out the next exhibit spot.

t_ch: 老板还是不够认可我倒影狸哩！那用战斗较量的方法，能不能让你认可我呢？
t_en: Boss still doesn't really appreciate me, the mighty Fureflecto! Maybe I can prove myself in a head-to-head showdown? You'll finally see what I'm capable of.

t_ch: 继续探索
t_en: Continue exploration

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。没想到司辰宫会派您过来帮忙，那我可就彻底放心了。
t_en: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. I didn't think the Palace of Astrum would send you over to help, so now I'm relieved.

t_ch: 我就喜欢助人为乐。
t_en: I love helping people.

t_ch: 真不愧是您，符合我对您一直以来的印象。
t_en: Truly, you are just as I have always imagined.

t_ch: 我听说薪水很高的样子。
t_en: I heard the remuneration is high.

t_ch: 我怎么不知道呢……
t_en: Why didn't I know...

t_ch: 我是被天舶司绑架来的。
t_en: The Sky-Faring Commission kidnapped me here.

t_ch: 天舶司还挺有手段……
t_en: The Sky-Faring Commission is quite resourceful...

t_ch: 那么话不多说，我们准备开工吧。我需要您操纵机巧鸟，找到丢失的货物。
t_en: Let's get ready to work then. I need you to control the cycrane and find the missing cargo.

t_ch: 找到货物后，只要拍照给我提供一个准确的位置就行，我会派专员回收，不必劳烦你。
t_en: After locating it, just send me a picture of it showing its exact location. I'll dispatch someone to recover it, don't you worry.

t_ch: 不过，在此之前……
t_en: But before that...

t_ch: 如您所见，这些机巧鸟栖木周围跑来些坏东西，多半是被鸟儿吸引来的，胡搞一气，连栖木都被咬坏了。
t_en: As you can see, these bad things running around the cycranes' roost are mostly attracted by the birds and are causing chaos. Even the roost is being bitten and damaged.

t_ch: 唉，当务之急还是尽快修理栖木，恢复物流系统。
t_en: *sigh* The top priority right now is still to repair the roost and restore the logistics system as soon as possible.

t_ch: 怪不得要「受过军事训练」…
t_en: No wonder the job asked for experience in military training...

t_ch: 是啊…这要是换别人来，我还真不一定能放心呢。
t_en: Yeah, if someone else were to take the job, I don't know if I'd be as relieved as if it was you.

t_ch: 原来还能打架！刺激啊！
t_en: A fight! So exciting!

t_ch: 那当然了，要是无聊的工作，我才不会劳烦您出手呢。
t_en: Of course. If it's something mundane and boring, I wouldn't have asked you.

t_ch: 你这活给多少钱我也干不了…
t_en: I cannot do this job no matter how much you pay me...

t_ch: 您可别打退堂鼓啊，我和鹤运物流现在可不能没有您。
t_en: Don't give up now. The Heron Express and I can't do it without you.

t_ch: 呃…忘了确认了，您肯定会修理栖木吧？
t_en: Um... I forgot to check with you. You do know how to fix the roost... right?

t_ch: 当然会。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 那就没问题了。
t_en: All's good then.

t_ch: 不太会。
t_en: Not really.

t_ch: 没关系，我知道您会修理一些机巧，仙舟上这些机巧的原理都大差不差。
t_en: No worries. I know you can fix some ingenium items. The ingenia used on the Xianzhou are all pretty much the same.

t_ch: 你自己怎么不去修？
t_en: Why can't you fix it yourself?

t_ch: 哎哟哟，我看见玉兆的界面就开始眩晕，还得是您来。
t_en: Oh, no no no. I get woozy and nauseated the moment I see the interface on the jade abacus. You do it.

t_ch: 那就麻烦您先去处理一下那些怪物了…余下的问题，等我们修好栖木以后再谈。
t_en: Please go and deal with those monsters first...we can talk about the remaining problems after we fix the roost.

t_ch: 这下就算是修好了…真是辛苦您了！
t_en: It's finally fixed...thank you so much for your hard work!

t_ch: 不过，接下来才是重头戏…您得操纵机巧鸟，寻找丢失的货物。
t_en: But, the next step is the main event...you need to operate the cycrane to find the lost cargo.

t_ch: 终于可以飞了！
t_en: Finally, fly time!

t_ch: 我当初第一次操纵机巧鸟的时候也这么开心！
t_en: I had the same reaction the first time I controlled the cycranes!

t_ch: 你怎么不自己来…
t_en: Why don't you do it yourself?

t_ch: 说来惭愧…自从做了管理岗以后，我已经很久没有自己实操了，手艺生疏…你懂吧？
t_en: This is embarrassing... Ever since I took on a management position, I haven't had much hands-on experience. Use it or lose it. You know what I'm saying?

t_ch: 总而言之，您只要找到丢失的货物，拍照给发给我就可以了！剩下的事情交给我们。
t_en: In any case, all you need to do is find the missing goods, take pictures, and send the pictures to me. We'll take care of the rest.

t_ch: 托您的福，流云渡的问题算是暂时解决了，鹤运物流也离恢复正常状态更近了一步。
t_en: Thanks to you, Cloudford's problems have been temporarily resolved, and Heron Express is one step closer to fully operational.

t_ch: 今天的工作就到此为止了，这是您应得的酬劳，请您收下吧！
t_en: That's all for today's work. This is your well-deserved reward. Please accept it!

t_ch: 之后…应该还会有类似的事情需要拜托您，到时还要再请您出手相助了。
t_en: In the future...there may be similar things that need your help. I'll have to ask for your assistance again.

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: 辛苦您了！我们下次再见！
t_en: Have a nice day. See you soon!

t_ch: 钱到位就行。
t_en: Just remember to pay me.

t_ch: 那必然不会亏待您。
t_en: Of course. We'll never shortchange you.

t_ch: 不得不说，您的表现真是远超预期。不但找到了遗失的货物，还顺便找到了一只遗失的机巧鸟…您果然值得信任。
t_en: I gotta say, your performance far exceeded expectations. Not only did you find the lost cargo, but you also happened to find a lost cycrane... You truly are trustworthy.

t_ch: 这是您应得的酬劳，请您收下吧！
t_en: This is your well-deserved reward. Please accept it!

t_ch: （呼，准备清理怪物了。）
t_en: (Phew, it's time to get rid of the monsters.)

t_ch: （嗯…该修理栖木了。）
t_en: (Hmm... It's time to fix the roost.)

t_ch: 我看看…咱们先去<color=#dbc291ff>积玉坊</color>那边找找看吧，记录显示有货物是在那附近丢失的。
t_en: Let me see... How about we head to the <color=#dbc291ff>Trove of Verdure</color> first? The record shows that some items were lost in that area.

t_ch: 我看看，下一件货物是丢失在…<color=#dbc291ff>流云渡</color>的货道附近。好，我们去看看吧！
t_en: Let me see, the next item was lost... near the Cargo Lane of <color=#dbc291ff>Cloudford</color>. Let's check the place out!

t_ch: 嗯？机巧鸟似乎收到了一些<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的讯号</color>？应该和我们要找的货物没关系，不过你有时间的话可以去找找看。
t_en: Eh? The cycrane seems to have received some <color=#dbc291ff>strange signals</color>. I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for, but you may search for them when you have the time.

t_ch: 原来那些奇怪的讯号是从这里发出的！看来这只可怜的机巧鸟是故障以后被困在这里了…没关系，我已经标记好了位置，很快就会有人来救它的。
t_en: So this is where those strange signals came from! Looks like this poor thing has been stuck here since it went faulty... Don't worry. I've marked its location, and someone will come to its aid in no time.

t_ch: 嗯！失踪货物已经标记好了，感谢您的协助！回收货物就交给我们来进行吧。
t_en: Yes! The missing items have been marked. Thanks for your help! We'll take care of the retrieval.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在穹仪附近。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索<color=#dbc291ff>穹仪下方</color>、传输带之间的空域。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Meridian Pin. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>under the Meridian Pin</color> and between conveyor belts.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在货物堆积处。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索龙门架附近、<color=#dbc291ff>集装箱的高处</color>。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost at the Goods Storage Area. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search near the gantry, <color=#dbc291ff>above the containers</color>.

t_ch: 已重新接入物流网络，感谢您的及时搜索。
t_en: I've been reconnected to the courier net. Thank you for your timely discovery.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，非常感谢您愿意再次来帮助我们！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, thank you for taking time to come help us again!

t_ch: 反正闲着也是闲着…
t_en: I was having some free time anyway...

t_ch: 机巧鸟还挺好玩的…
t_en: Cycranes are fun to play...

t_ch: 我非常理解您的想法。不过…在此之前……
t_en: I feel you. But before that...

t_ch: 如您所见……
t_en: As you can see...

t_ch: 这怪物是准时上工么…
t_en: ...Are the monsters on a payroll too?

t_ch: 怎么又要打怪…
t_en: Monsters again?

t_ch: 这台出了故障的栖木周围也聚拢了不少怪物。天底下哪儿有这么巧的事情，真古怪。
t_en: There are also monsters gathered around this malfunctioning roost. It's strange that there are so many coincidences.

t_ch: 实在是不好意思，那么就拜托您了……
t_en: I'm really sorry to trouble you with this...

t_ch: 这些孽物似乎受这故障栖木的吸引，聚集在了一起…天舶司已经在调查了。
t_en: These abominations seem to be attracted by this malfunctioning roost and have gathered around it... The Sky-Faring Commission is already investigating.

t_ch: 好，这个栖木也恢复正常了！{NICKNAME}，辛苦您了！
t_en: Great, this roost is back to normal as well! Thank you so much for your help, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 那么接下来，咱们就该用机巧鸟寻找失物了。准备好了吗？
t_en: Now, it's time to search for the lost cargo with the cycrane. Are you ready?

t_ch: 唉，这里的问题也总算是解决了…再次感谢您的帮助！
t_en: Well, at least the problem here has been solved... Thank you again for your assistance!

t_ch: 之后应该还有一些类似的事情需要您帮忙，到时候我们再联系吧。
t_en: There may be similar tasks in the future that we'll need your help with. We'll get in contact with you then.

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: 这几次真是辛苦您了！我们下次再见！
t_en: Thanks for all your help the past few times! See you next time!

t_ch: 希望下次别打怪了…
t_en: Hopefully there won't be any monsters next time...

t_ch: 放心好啦，倒也不至于每个栖木都发生了故障…应该…不至于吧……
t_en: Don't worry, not every roost will be malfunctioning... I hope...

t_ch: 您不但找回了丢失的货物，还找回了丢失的机巧鸟，超额完成任务！我真是没看错您！请收下这些酬劳吧！
t_en: Not only did you find the lost cargo, but also the missing cycrane, exceeding our expectations! I knew I could count on you. Please accept this payment as a token of our appreciation!

t_ch: （呼，准备清理怪物了。）
t_en: (Phew, it's time to get rid of the monsters.)

t_ch: （这次应该能轻车熟路地修理好吧。）
t_en: (I should be able to fix it effortlessly this time.)

t_ch: 这次我们要找的第一件失物，似乎是遗失在了<color=#dbc291ff>禨祥台</color>附近。飞过去找找看吧。
t_en: The first item we are looking for seems to be lost near <color=#dbc291ff>Fortuna Augurstead</color>. Let's fly over there.

t_ch: 接下来…我们去<color=#dbc291ff>授事厅</color>附近看看吧。似乎有货物是遗失在那里的。
t_en: Next... let's check out the area near the <color=#dbc291ff>Conclave Hall</color>. It seems that some items were lost there.

t_ch: 最后一个货物应该丢在了<color=#dbc291ff>大衍穷观阵</color>附近，我们去找找看吧。
t_en: I think the last item was lost near the <color=#dbc291ff>Matrix of Prescience Ultima</color>. Let's go check it out.

t_ch: 我们好像又收到了一些<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的讯号</color>…应该跟咱们要找的遗失物没什么关系，不过有时间的话还是去看一眼吧。
t_en: We seem to have received some <color=#dbc291ff>strange signals</color> again... I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for, but you may search for them when you have the time.

t_ch: 怎么会有机巧鸟被困在这里啊…应该是故障以后被困在这里了…标记一下位置吧，会有专员来救它的。
t_en: Why is there a cycrane here... I suppose it has been stuck here since it went faulty... Let me mark the location, and I believe a specialist will come to its aid in no time.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在穷观阵外围建筑。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索封火墙附近、<color=#dbc291ff>屋檐上方</color>。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost in the buildings around the Matrix of Prescience. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search near the firewall, <color=#dbc291ff>on top of the roof</color>.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在授事厅附近。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索授事厅<color=#dbc291ff>平台下方</color>、飞檐上方。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Conclave Hall. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>under the terrace</color> of the Conclave Hall, above the cornices.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在宙合阵阵基附近。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索<color=#dbc291ff>阵基穹顶上方</color>。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Temporal Terminal. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>above the base terminal's dome</color>.

t_ch: 谁不是为了生活呢…
t_en: I'm just trying to make a living here...

t_ch: 请收下这些酬劳吧。
t_en: Please take these rewards.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！您又来帮我了！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you came to help again!

t_ch: 栖木边上怎么没有孽物？
t_en: How come there are no abominations near the roost?

t_ch: 今天怎么看起来这么和平…
t_en: Why does it look so peaceful today...?

t_ch: 瞧您这话说的！要是每个栖木都坏掉了，那我们鹤运物流也太没用了。肯定还是有这样安全的地方啊！
t_en: What are you talking about? If every roost has broken down, then the Heron Express would have been good for nothing. Safe places like this would still exist, of course!

t_ch: 安全的地方为什么需要我…
t_en: If it were that safe, why would you need me...

t_ch: 这…丹鼎司这边不是藏着药王秘传的邪徒恶党吗…所以我稍微有点怕……
t_en: Well... Aren't the evil Disciples of Sanctus Medicus hiding over here in the Alchemy Commission...? So, I'm a little scared...

t_ch: 有{M#哥}{F#姐}在，别害怕！
t_en: Fear not, for your trusty big {M#bro}{F#sis} is here!

t_ch: 我好像比您大个几百岁…唉，不过确实，有您在我是安心的。
t_en: I think I'm older than you by a few hundred years... But yes, with you around, I feel safer.

t_ch: 别害怕，我比你更害怕。
t_en: Worry not, I'm more scared than you are!

t_ch: 我不相信这银河里面还有能让您害怕的东西！
t_en: I don't believe there's anything in this cosmos that can scare you!

t_ch: 总之这次工作应该是轻松愉快的啦！不会出什么问题的！
t_en: Anyway, this job should be easy peasy lemon squeezy! There won't be any problems!

t_ch: 驭空大人命我带队调查恶意破坏栖木的犯人，一路追查到了这里…看起来，那些人似乎是药王秘传的信徒。
t_en: I was instructed by Madam Yukong to lead a team to investigate the culprit who vandalized the roost, and the clues bring me here... Those people seem to be the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: 他们应该是把栖木改造一番，发射了某种特定频率的信号，引来丰饶孽物。
t_en: I suppose they have modified the roost to emit a signal of a specific frequency to attract the Abominations of Abundance.

t_ch: 他们现在就藏在这里？
t_en: Are they hiding here?

t_ch: 看起来是这样的…但这丹鼎司地形复杂，用大部队寻找可能会惊动他们。所以……
t_en: That seems to be the case... However, the Alchemy Commission has a complex terrain, and we might alert them if we send everyone out to look for them. So...

t_ch: 这您可找对人了，夕葵大人，咱们{NICKNAME}最擅长用机巧鸟找东西了！
t_en: You've come to the right person, Lady Xikui. {NICKNAME} here is an expert in finding things with cycranes!

t_ch: 过奖过奖。
t_en: You flatter me.

t_ch: 你可真会替我揽活。
t_en: You really know how to give me more work.

t_ch: 我这不也是怕您的才能被埋没嘛！
t_en: I just don't want to see your talent go to waste!

t_ch: 我就是为这个来的…{NICKNAME}，这件事可真的要拜托你了～
t_en: That's why I'm here... {NICKNAME}, I'm counting on you for this matter.

t_ch: 既然你都这么说了…
t_en: Since you've said so...

t_ch: 真拿你没办法～
t_en: I have no reason to say no.

t_ch: 这得加钱！
t_en: I need extra pay for this!

t_ch: 哎，{NICKNAME}太可靠了！我会向驭空大人多夸夸你的～
t_en: Oh, {NICKNAME}. You're so reliable! I'll sing your praises in front of Madam Yukong!

t_ch: 行了，不要再负隅顽抗了，你们已经无路可逃！
t_en: Stop resisting! You guys have no way to escape!

t_ch: 负隅顽抗？呵呵，我还以为你们是多少人在追我们，原来只有三个！
t_en: Stop resisting? Hehe, I thought there was an army going after us! It turns out there are only three of you!

t_ch: 三个人…甚至还有一个可悲的短生种，竟然想要抓住老子？做你们的美梦吧！
t_en: Only three... and one of you is a pathetic short-life species. Want to catch me? Dream on!

t_ch: 「可悲的短生种」？连{NICKNAME}都不认得，竟然还敢在罗浮作奸犯科？
t_en: "A pathetic short-life species"? How dare you commit evil deeds on the Luofu when you don't even recognize {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 呼…刚才可真是千钧一发，幸亏有{NICKNAME}在……
t_en: Phew... that was close. Fortunately, you were there, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 不好意思啊…把你们两个也卷到了这么危险的事情里面。
t_en: I'm sorry... I got you two involved in such a dangerous situation.

t_ch: 助人为乐而已。
t_en: Helping others is my pleasure.

t_ch: 没错没错，都是我们应该做的。
t_en: Indeed. We're just doing our job.

t_ch: 这种事我见多了。
t_en: I deal with this kind of thing all the time.

t_ch: 真不愧是你～
t_en: That's impressive!

t_ch: 那多给点工钱吧…
t_en: How about you pay me a little more...

t_ch: 那当然了，天舶司一定会给你相应的酬劳～
t_en: Don't worry. The Sky-Faring Commission will definitely reward you handsomely.

t_ch: 收下这些吧，这是给你的谢礼。
t_en: Please take this. It's my token of appreciation for you.

t_ch: 还有这些，这是您的工钱～希望下次还能有机会与您合作！
t_en: And this is your pay. I hope I'll get to work with you again next time!

t_ch: 希望下一次…不要再遇到这种危险的情况了……
t_en: I hope it will be something less dangerous next time...

t_ch: 行医市集还藏着药王秘传…
t_en: Some Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are still hiding in the Healer's Market.

t_ch: 这个您就不必担心了，您找到他们时我就立刻报告了神策府。咱们现在说话这会儿，那几个家伙应该已经被云骑抓捕归案啦～
t_en: Don't worry about that. I've already informed the Seat of Divine Foresight when you found them. By now, I believe they have been arrested by the Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在行医市集附近，根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索商铺<color=#dbc291ff>屋檐上方</color>。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near Healer's Market. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>above the store roofs</color>.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在太真丹室附近，根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索<color=#dbc291ff>建木枝条附近</color>。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Aureate Elixir Furnace. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>near the Ambrosial Arbor's branches</color>.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，药王秘传潜伏在观颐台附近，根据相关犯罪记录，此人可能正在<color=#dbc291ff>沿海长廊附近</color>进行破坏。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are hiding near the Elixir Research Terrace. Based on relevant criminal records, they might be engaging in destructive behavior <color=#dbc291ff>near the Seaside Promenade</color>.

t_ch: 接下来…稍等我看下记录…去<color=#dbc291ff>行医市集</color>附近看看吧。
t_en: Next... let me check the records... Let's head to the area near the <color=#dbc291ff>Healer's Market</color> for a look.

t_ch: 第一站先去<color=#dbc291ff>太真丹室</color>吧，那里似乎有咱们鹤运物流遗失的货物。
t_en: Let's stop by the <color=#dbc291ff>Aureate Elixir Furnace</color> first. I think we will find some missing items from Heron Express there.

t_ch: 这附近好像有一些<color=#dbc291ff>干扰信号</color>…怎么回事？虽然应该和咱们要找的货物没关系，不过要不要过去看一看呢？
t_en: There seem to be some <color=#dbc291ff>interfering signals</color> in this area... What's going on? I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for. Should we check them out anyway?

t_ch: 这…这是…药王秘传？竟然藏在这种地方…咱们快走吧，不要打草惊蛇。我已经标记了这几个家伙的位置，神策府会来处理的。
t_en: Are... are they the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus? I can't believe they are hiding in such a place... Let's get out of here so as not to alert them. I've marked their location, and I believe those from the Seat of Divine Foresight will come and deal with them.

t_ch: 夕葵大人说，恶意破坏栖木的犯人在<color=#dbc291ff>观颐台</color>附近，赶紧操控物流鸟去那里找找吧。
t_en: According to Lady Xikui, the culprit who vandalized the roost is near the <color=#dbc291ff>Elixir Research Terrace</color>. Let's send a courier cycrane over there right away.

t_ch: 只要找到最后的遗失物，就可以下班回家啦！太好了，今天没发生任何意外状况～
t_en: We can wrap things up after retrieving the last missing item! It's great that everything went well today.

t_ch: 梓桥小姐，你们都在啊…现在发生了一点意外状况……
t_en: I see everyone is here. Miss Ziqiao. There's been a mishap...

t_ch: 夕葵大人？你怎么来了？
t_en: Lady Xikui? What brings you here?

t_ch: 啊！那人是不是在破坏栖木？这就是药王秘传的信徒吧！
t_en: Ah! Are they vandalizing the roost? It's Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, isn't it?

t_ch: 没错，就是这家伙…啊！他好像看到我们了，{NICKNAME}，走，我们追上去！
t_en: It's them! Ah! I think they've seen us. {NICKNAME}, let's go after them!

t_ch: 他们逃的好快啊……
t_en: They're so fast...

t_ch: 哼…他们逃不掉的。
t_en: Hmph... They won't get away.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，夕葵大人，走这边，这边能把他们逼进死胡同。
t_en: {NICKNAME} and Lady Xikui, please head this way and force them to a dead end.

t_ch: 呼…这下这几个家伙可就跑不掉了。
t_en: Phew... Now, they have nowhere to go.

t_ch: 比起找到失物，当下最紧迫的还是去找到问题源头的药王秘传，抓紧时间吧。
t_en: Finding the missing items isn't our priority now. We should locate the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus who are the source of the problem, first. Hurry up!

t_ch: （靠太近容易打草惊蛇，离远点拍照记录位置告知梓桥吧。）
t_en: (Getting too close might alert them. I should take a photo from a distance to mark the location and notify Ziqiao.)

t_en: Please select the area to explore.

t_en: Trove of Verdure, South Wing

t_ch: 机巧鸟返航中…
t_en: Cycrane is returning...

t_ch: 禨祥台
t_en: Fortuna Augurstead

t_ch: 授事厅
t_en: Conclave Hall

t_ch: 大衍穷观阵
t_en: Matrix of Prescience Ultima

t_en: Cycrane is returning to the safe zone...

t_en: Healer's Market

t_ch: 太真丹室

t_en: The signal monitoring system is now available and searching the target area.

t_en: Whenever you're ready, you can send the cycrane off.

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，<color=#dbc291ff>可疑的信号源似乎就在附近</color>，请仔细查找附近区域。
t_en: The signal monitoring system indicates that the <color=#dbc291ff>source of the suspicious signal is nearby</color>. Please do a thorough search of this area.

t_en: Connecting to roost signal...

t_en: "*Intermittent mechanical noise* Here... Cycrane, please... send... help."

t_ch: 「*不连续的机械噪音*谨记…秘行…事，切勿…打草…蛇。」
t_en: "*Intermittent mechanical noise* Remember... act covertly... Don't... expose yourself."

t_ch: 世上还是好人多…
t_en: There are still many kind people in the world...

t_ch: 中止遥控
t_en: Stop remote control

t_ch: 信号监测系统提示，当前区域可疑的信号已经全部确认。

t_ch: 这里猎狗绝对找不到…
t_en: The hounds will never find this spot...

t_en: How come I can hear the wind blowing above my head?

t_ch: 你一定就是{NICKNAME}吧？久仰大名了！我叫文雯，是鹤运物流的专员。
t_en: You must be {NICKNAME}, right? I've heard a lot about you! I'm Wenwen, a specialist from Heron Express.

t_ch: 是我没错。
t_en: That's me.

t_ch: 你认错人了。
t_en: You've got the wrong person.

t_ch: 可是夕葵姐姐给我的照片就是你啊。

t_ch: 你放心啦，我们是正规机构。
t_en: Don't worry. We're legit.

t_ch: 相信夕葵大人也和你说了，鹤运物流运输中的很多货物都丢失了。
t_en: I believe Xikui has told you that many Heron Express cargo have been lost in transit.

t_ch: 鹤运物流想委托你到这些货物丢失的地方，用机巧鸟居高临下地搜索丢失的货物，总比人用肉眼找要可靠许多。
t_en: Heron Express wants to commission you to go to the place where these goods were lost and search for them with cycranes from a high vantage point. That would be much more efficient than getting people to manually look for it with just eyes.

t_ch: 那些地方地形复杂，且不太安全…途中可能会遇到一些危险。
t_en: Those places are complicated in topography and not very safe... You might encounter some dangers along the way.

t_ch: 如果你准备好了，我们这就出发吧。
t_en: If you're ready, we'll go ahead and move out.

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 能和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}共事，真是太荣幸了！

t_ch: 我要去干什么来着？
t_en: What am I here to do again?

t_en: Allow me to repeat... Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where the goods went missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

t_ch: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请您最好准备。
t_en: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

t_ch: 等等再去。
t_en: Maybe later.

t_ch: 嗯嗯，你什么时候准备好了，咱们什么时候出发。
t_en: Sure. Lemme know when you're ready. We'll head out straight away.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来了？
t_en: You're here, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我们这边还有些失踪的货物需要用机巧鸟寻找…如果你有时间的话，可以再来帮帮忙吗？
t_en: We still have some missing cargo to search for with cycranes... If you have the time, can you come over and lend a helping hand?

t_ch: 没问题啊，走吧。
t_en: No problem. Let's go.

t_ch: 太感谢了！走吧，我送你过去～
t_en: Thank you so much! Let's go. I'll send you there~

t_ch: 我要去干什么来着？
t_en: What am I here to do again?

t_ch: 鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
t_en: Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where the goods went missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

t_ch: 还有别的事…
t_en: I have other things to do...

t_ch: 没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
t_en: No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, we meet again.

t_ch: 你不会又要有求于我吧？
t_en: You don't need my help again, do you?

t_ch: 您把我当成什么人啦，哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Did I leave such a bad impression on you last time? Hahahaha

t_ch: …不过，您要是有空闲时间无处发挥的话，你懂的。
t_en: But anyway, if you have time to spare and nothing to do... You catch my drift?

t_ch: 最近应该没有丢失货物吧？
t_en: No items have gone missing recently, right?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，物流公司哪里会一直丢货物呢？
t_en: Hahaha. It shouldn't be a regular thing for a logistics company.

t_ch: …不过，鹤运物流最近确实丢了些货物，你懂的。
t_en: ...Well, Heron Express has indeed lost some items recently. You know what I'm saying?

t_ch: 您先不要紧张，我先告诉你一个好消息吧！
t_en: Don't get all worked up first. I come bearing good news!

t_ch: 我已经帮您开启了永久认证的权限，你之前负责过的栖木留下了您的操作权限，<color=#dbc291ff>您可以随时回去操纵机巧鸟</color>…呃，拍照？
t_en: I have activated permanent access authentication for you. As you already have access to the roost you managed before, <color=#dbc291ff>you can go back anytime and use the cycranes</color> to... uhm... maybe, take photos?

t_ch: 不过我更希望您来帮帮我，帮帮鹤运物流……
t_en: I'd be even happier if you could help me and Heron Express...

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: 那个…我们的回收预算被砍掉了，就算麻烦您出手帮忙，我也没有办法给你任何回报了…没关系吗？
t_en: But... our retrieval budget for this has been cut, so we won't able to pay you for your help. Are you still fine with it?

t_ch: 不必多说，带路吧。
t_en: Say no more. Show me the way.

t_ch: …您真是太好了！我们这就出发。
t_en: ...You're so nice! Let's hit the road right away.

t_ch: 以后一定。
t_en: Next time for sure.

t_ch: 好吧，我知道这是强人所难——接下来就交给我们鹤运物流吧。
t_en: I understand this might be a little too much. Just leave the rest to us.

t_ch: …不过，你要是真的有空，随时都可以来找我！
t_en: ...Still, you are welcome to come find me anytime if you are free!

t_ch: 我要去干什么来着？
t_en: What do I have to do?

t_ch: 鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
t_en: Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where goods have gone missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

t_ch: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请你最好准备。
t_en: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

t_ch: 还有别的事…
t_en: I have other things to do...

t_ch: 没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
t_en: No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。鹤运物流最近确实丢了些货物，你懂的。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, we meet again. ...Well, Heron Express has indeed lost some items recently. You know what I'm saying?

t_ch: 缺了您的经验和能力，搜救效率简直是出大问题，我只好得拜托您，来帮帮我，帮帮鹤运物流……
t_en: Without your experience and expertise, the retrieval efficiency would simply be disastrous. I have no choice but to ask you to help me and Heron Express...

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: 那个…我们的回收预算被砍掉了，就算麻烦您出手帮忙，我也没有办法给你任何回报了…没关系吗？
t_en: But... our retrieval budget for this has been cut, so we won't able to pay you for your help. Are you still fine with it?

t_ch: 不必多说，带路吧。
t_en: Say no more. Show me the way.

t_ch: …您真是太好了！我们这就出发。
t_en: ...You're so nice! Let's hit the road right away.

t_ch: 以后一定。
t_en: Next time for sure.

t_ch: 好吧，我知道这是强人所难——接下来就交给我们鹤运物流吧。
t_en: I understand this might be a little too much. Just leave the rest to us.

t_ch: …不过，你要是真的有空，随时都可以来找我！
t_en: ...Still, you are welcome to come find me anytime if you are free!

t_ch: 我要去干什么来着？
t_en: What do I have to do?

t_ch: 鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
t_en: Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where goods have gone missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

t_ch: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请你最好准备。
t_en: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

t_ch: 还有别的事…
t_en: I have other things to do...

t_ch: 没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
t_en: No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.

t_ch: 这位客人，柜台上的东西可不兴这样带走啊？
t_en: You think you can just take things from the counter like that?

t_ch: 不好意思，我这就还给你。
t_en: I'm sorry. Let me give that back to you.

t_ch: 这个小零件给我又何妨？
t_en: Why not just let me have this small component?

t_ch: 呵呵，我没有要在这小零件上刁难客人的意思，毕竟小小零件。
t_en: Hehe, I didn't mean to make things hard on you. After all, it's just a small component.

t_ch: 不过咱这里是「赎珠阁」，换言之，咱这里是家典当铺，我对商品的价值也格外敏感——你以为它毫无价值时，它可能价值连城。
t_en: But we're the Jeweler's Pagoda here, a pawnshop, and that's why I'm particularly sensitive to a good price — one man's trash is another man's treasure.

t_ch: 客人，你拿走这枚小零件之后，打算要怎么做呢？
t_en: What do you plan on doing with that small component then?

t_ch: 我喜好收集，会放在背包里。
t_en: I like to collect them for my inventory.

t_ch: 然后过不了多久，你就会想不起自己曾经放过一枚零件在背包里。
t_en: And let me guess: After no time at all, you've forgotten that you ever had anything in there at all, right?

t_ch: 我应该没有说错吧？
t_en: I'm right, aren't I?

t_ch: 我相信它总之有一天会有用的。
t_en: I trust that it'll be useful someday.

t_ch: 总有一天会有用…但是你知道它现在毫无用处。
t_en: Someday... But right now, it's useless.

t_ch: 我应该没有说错吧？
t_en: I'm right, aren't I?
